-- 1 of 10 --

Module 7 - Lesson 6
Overview Of Sequence Messaging:
1. 	List 0 	- The Prospect Follow-Up Sequence!
2. List C 	- The Main Customer Thank You Sequence!
3. List 1 	- The Customer Captivation & SC Sequence!
4. List 2 	- The Reverse 	Add-On & SC Sequence!
5. List 3 	- The Soft 	Add-On & SC Sequence!
6. List 4 	- The Mid-Tier 	Add-On & SC Sequence!
7. List 5 	- The Thank You Page “Gift Offer” Sequence!
8. List 6 	- The Premium Offer Thank You Sequence

-- 2 of 10 --

Module 7 - Lesson 6
Overview Of Sequence Messaging:
1. 	List 0 	- The Prospect Follow-Up Sequence
•Day 1: Hook/Promise - Watch Video!
•Day 2: Customer Transformation Story #1!
•Day 3: 	Problem/Agitate/Solve!
•Day 4: Big Benefit #1!
•Day 5: Big Benefit #2!
•Day 6: 	Customer Transformation Story #2!
•Day 7: 	Frankly, I’m Puzzled…

•Day 1: Welcome!
•Day 2: Consumption 1!
•Day 4: Consumption 2!
•Day 6: Consumption 3!

•Day 9: Bonus Webinar 	Reminder 2
